repos.name: agentlens
repos.description: Local-first, privacy-first analytics & coaching for AI coding agents.

repos.name: headroom
repos.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

repos.name: agent-usage
repos.description: Local-only dashboard that reads Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, GitHub Copilot, and Antigravity usage live from the filesystem - token/cost analytics for the first four, activity-only for Antigravity. No DB, no auth, no external requests.

repos.name: mhaitana.dev
repos.description: A theme-aware personal website and GitHub dashboard. Features a fluid, mobile-optimized design, dynamic contribution graph, and interactive timeline. Built with Next.js 15, Tailwind v4, and Archivo/Space Grotesk typography.

repos.name: docker-llm-stack
repos.description: Hardware-aware, containerized LLM stack featuring Ollama, Open WebUI, and PostgreSQL with automated spec-based model optimization.
